purpose: Internal workspace volume is near the admission threshold, but Cargo target and temp scratch are correctly routed to external storage.

evidence: no mail probe in this scenario
workspace free bytes below build admission threshold
no search/context burst in this scenario

expectedDegraded.reason: Workspace free space is below the configured safe admission floor even though build outputs are external.

expectedRecoveryActions.summary: Collect disk posture without deleting files.
Ask the human before cleanup; prefer non-destructive relocation manifests.
expectedRecoveryActions.manualStep: Use the disk-pressure repair planner and request explicit approval for any cleanup or deletion.
preconditions: Repair planner identifies safe relocation candidates
